---
title: "draft1"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ipumsr)
ddi <- read_ipums_ddi("ahtus_00001.xml")
df <- read_ipums_micro(ddi)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

filtered_data <- df %>%
  filter(
    CIVSTAT == 1,
    HHTYPE == 1,
    UNDER18 >= 1,
    AGE >= 22 & AGE <= 40,
    EDUC %in% c(5, 6),
    AGEYNGST >= 0 & AGEYNGST <= 18,
    SEX %in% c(1, 2),
    YEAR == 2018
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex_label = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Male", "Female"),
    ACT_UNDOM_HRS = ACT_UNDOM / 60   # convert minutes → hours
  )

summary_data <- filtered_data %>%
  group_by(sex_label) %>%
  summarise(avg_domestic_hours = mean(ACT_UNDOM_HRS, na.rm = TRUE))

ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = sex_label, y = avg_domestic_hours, fill = sex_label)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(avg_domestic_hours, 2)),  # show values
    vjust = -0.5,                              # position above bars
    size = 5
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Time Spent on Unpaid Domestic Work by Sex (2018)",
    x = "Sex",
    y = "Average Hours per Day"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Male" = "steelblue", "Female" = "salmon"))
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

filtered_data <- df %>%
  filter(
    CIVSTAT == 1,
    HHTYPE == 1,
    UNDER18 >= 1,
    AGE >= 22 & AGE <= 40,
    EDUC %in% c(5, 6),
    AGEYNGST >= 0 & AGEYNGST <= 18,
    SEX %in% c(1, 2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex_label = ifelse(SEX == 1, "Male", "Female"),
    ACT_UNDOM_HRS = ACT_UNDOM / 60
  )

# Average hours by year and sex
summary_data <- filtered_data %>%
  group_by(YEAR, sex_label) %>%
  summarise(avg_domestic_hours = mean(ACT_UNDOM_HRS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Line plot
ggplot(summary_data, aes(x = YEAR, y = avg_domestic_hours, color = sex_label)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Unpaid Domestic Work by Sex (1930 - 2018)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Average Hours per Day",
    color = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Male" = "steelblue", "Female" = "salmon"))

# Note for 2018
# 2.72 hrs for female
# 1.57 hrs for male
```
